ddls:
CREATE TABLE "productions" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the production */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the production started */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime of the production in minutes */,
  "genre" INTEGER /* Genre of the production */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the production */,
  "production_type" TEXT /* Type of production (e.g., film, television) */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Current status of the production (e.g., pre-production, released) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the production */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the production */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director of the production */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer of the production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_productions_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES people ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_productions_genre FOREIGN KEY ("genre") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_productions_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES people ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "people" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the person */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the person in the production (e.g., actor, director) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the person */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the person */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the person */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the person */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the person's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person playing the role */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production in which the role is played */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the person */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_type" TEXT /* Type of role (e.g., main, supporting, cameo) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_roles_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES people ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_roles_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating value */,
  "source" INTEGER /* Source of the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "rating_scale" TEXT /* Scale used for the rating (e.g., 1-10, 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes in the version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., theatrical, director's cut) */,
  "version_size" TEXT /* Size of the version file (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_versions_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production being marketed */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget for the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of marketing campaign (e.g., social media, TV ads) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audience_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement entry */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production */,
  "engagement_metric" TEXT /* Type of engagement metric (e.g., views, likes, shares) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the engagement metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "engagement_source" TEXT /* Source of the engagement (e.g., social media, website) */,
  "engagement_location" TEXT /* Location where the engagement was recorded (e.g., country, city) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audience_engagement_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, CSV, database) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or endpoint of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production the report is about */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., financial, audience analysis) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, marketing) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., production, marketing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made (e.g., IP address, device) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id")
)
